title: cosmos deficiens
intro: Cosmos deficiens, also known as the lesser cosmos or baby's breath, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of cosmos deficiens include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, among others. Cosmos deficiens can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to herbal remedies.
